main.description: Contributor presentation defaults reusable across multiple boards. Extends an org.hypercerts.claim.contributorInformation record with visual and interactive properties.

contributorRef.description: Reference to the org.hypercerts.claim.contributorInformation record this extends.

videoUrl.description: Default video URL for this contributor across boards.

hoverImageUrl.description: Default hover image URL for this contributor across boards.

hoverIframeUrl.description: Default hover iframe URL for this contributor across boards.

circularImage.description: Default circular image crop setting for this contributor. Default: true.

url.description: Default click-through link URL for this contributor across boards.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
